subtitle: remote terminal · via bridge
no_hosts: No hosts yet. Create your first →
settings_hint: The terminal connects to a small bridge running on one of your own machines (PC/Pi/NAS). No third-party services. Start nucleo-ssh-bridge, then paste the URL and token here.
token_ph: paste the token printed by the bridge
need_bridge_first: Set the bridge URL and token first.
form_intro: Enter the details. The password / key is NOT saved: you type it at connect time.
hostkey_banner: host key {fp} — verify that it is yours.
gate_body: It connects to your SSH hosts through a small bridge you run on one of your own machines (PC/Pi/NAS) — no third-party service. Start tools/nucleo-ssh-bridge (npm i && node index.js), then set the URL and token here.
